creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since version 4.20 XFCE does not install a .desktop file for xscreensaver, so there is no duplicate name anymore.

If a .desktop file for startup is required for xscreensaver it should be provided by the xscreensaver distribution or its port.

Ref:

https://gitlab.xfce.org/xfce/xfce4-session/-/commit/9a63a6224466c17243fb192a70920133d1f2d3d3

https://gitlab.xfce.org/xfce/xfce4-session/-/issues/60
